candidates.title: China's AI suppliers can't keep up as critical component shortages hit production
candidates.content: China's AI suppliers can't keep up as critical component shortages hit production
candidates.description:
China's AI hardware suppliers can't keep up with surging demand because critical components are scarce and production capacity is lacking, Bloomberg reports.
The article China's AI suppliers can't keep up as critical component shortages hit production appeared first on The Decoder.
